heading: Adjustment of allocated visitor-use days
label: 8547 Adjustment of allocated visitor-use days
notes: References in TextAs amended by this title, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b)(2), means as amended by title III of .Pub. L. 118–234
amendments: References in TextAs amended by this title, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b)(2), means as amended by title III of .Pub. L. 118–234

children.heading: Adjustments following use of allocation reviews
children.label: a Adjustments following use of allocation reviews

children.text: If the Secretary concerned determines that the performance of the recreation service provider was satisfactory during the most recent review conducted under subsection (a) of , the annual number of visitor-use days allocated for each remaining year of the permit shall be equal to 125 percent of the number of visitor-use days used, as determined under subsection (b)(2)(A) of that section, during the year identified under subsection (b)(2)(B) of that section, not to exceed the level allocated to the recreation service provider on the date on which the special recreation permit was issued.section 8546 of this title

If the Secretary concerned determines the performance of the recreation service provider is less than satisfactory during the most recent performance review conducted under subsection (a) of , the annual number of visitor-use days allocated for each remaining year of the special recreation permit shall be equal to not more than 100 percent of the number of visitor-use days used, as determined under subsection (b)(2)(A) of that section during the year identified under subsection (b)(2)(B) of that section.section 8546 of this title

children.heading: Temporary reassignment of unused visitor-use days
children.label: b Temporary reassignment of unused visitor-use days

children.text: any other existing or potential recreation service provider, notwithstanding the number of visitor-use days allocated to the special recreation permit holder under the special recreation permit held or to be held by the recreation service provider; or
any existing or potential holder of a special recreation permit described in clause (i) or (iii) of paragraph (13)(A) of (as amended by this title), including the public.section 6801 of this title

children.heading: Additional capacity
children.label: c Additional capacity
children.text: If unallocated visitor-use days are available, the Secretary concerned may, at any time, amend a special recreation permit to allocate additional visitor-use days to a qualified recreation service provider.
